title: Case study — Cortex
summary: Local-first Mac app for continuous screen/audio capture with on-device AI search and chat. Tauri v2 + SvelteKit + Rust + MLX. PUBLIC (github.com/nino-chavez/cortex).

strategy.decision: Second AI-products deep-dive — cortex is PUBLIC, externally verifiable, and demonstrates range beyond agentic-software (local-first, on-device AI, Rust + MLX). Five compositions following the standard case-study template: hero → schematic (cortex-local-pipeline showing capture → MLX → search) → approach → quotable → outcome.
strategy.why: Pairs with atelier as the second PUBLIC AI-products case study. Shows on-device + local-first depth that contrasts with the agent-orchestration work — important for not collapsing all AI work into one tone.
strategy.shipped: v2 did not surface cortex at all (not in the original 5-case slate).
strategy.gap: Proposed = surface cortex with PUBLIC badge + local-pipeline schematic; Shipped = invisible.
strategy.question: Is the local-pipeline schematic representative or oversimplified? cortex has Tauri + SvelteKit + Rust + MLX — pick the load-bearing 4-5 nodes.

currentState.summary: cortex was not in v2's case-study slate.
currentState.annotation: New case-study surfacing for v3. Cluster IA enabled discovery — cortex is PUBLIC and load-bearing for the AI-products cluster's credibility.
